title: astragalus creticus subsp. samius
intro: Astragalus creticus subsp. samius, also known as the Crete astragalus or Samius milkvetch, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus creticus subsp. samius include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Astragalus creticus subsp. samius can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine and a subject of modern research.
